guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.tip1: Create a research topic to conduct user interviews using AI
guide.tip2: Click on a card to view interview subjects, content, and full reports

guide.title: Usage Guide
guide.tip1: Add more interview subjects to gain more comprehensive insights
guide.tip2: Select individual interviews one by one, or use "Start All Interviews" to begin in batch
guide.tip3: Generate reports at any time during interviews, or generate a final report after all interviews are completed

PasswordReset.resetLinkText: Click here to reset your password
PasswordReset.expirationNote: This link will expire in 30 minutes.
PasswordReset.ignoreMessage: If you didn't request this password reset, please ignore this email.

PasswordReset.automatedEmailDisclaimer: This is an automated email from atypica.AI. Please do not reply to this email.

Verification.expirationNote: This code will expire in 30 minutes.

ReportCompletion.reportReadyText: Your study report for "{topic}" has been successfully generated and is now available for viewing.
ReportCompletion.viewStudyText: You can access your report by visiting the study
ReportCompletion.viewStudyMessage: Please visit the study to view your report:
ReportCompletion.thanksMessage: Thank you for using atypica.AI for your study needs. We hope the insights provided are valuable to you.
ReportCompletion.automatedEmailDisclaimer: This is an automated email from atypica.AI. Please do not reply to this email.

StudyInterruption.interruptionText: Your study on "{topic}" was unexpectedly interrupted. Don't worry, your progress has been saved.
StudyInterruption.continueInstructionsText: You can continue your study by clicking the button below and then typing "continue" in the chat box or clicking the Continue button.
StudyInterruption.supportText: If you encounter any issues, please click the chat icon in the bottom right corner of the study page for assistance.
StudyInterruption.thanksMessage: Thank you for your patience and for using atypica.AI for your study needs.
StudyInterruption.automatedEmailDisclaimer: This is an automated email from atypica.AI. Please do not reply to this email.

StatusDisplay.confirmAbortDescription: This will stop the current background task. The results may be incomplete.
